name: Cloud Pouch
description:
This small bag is filled with a fine, silvery powder that feels silky to the touch.

Activate—Disperse 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You scatter the dust into the air around you, causing it to condense into a cloud in a within 10 feet, as the spell. You can Sustain the activation to make the cloud Fly 20 feet. The cloud lasts 1 minute, and you can Dismiss it.
